name: Add action list support to Task

plannedActions.name: Update Forma.ts imports: add FormaCollection and Action imports
Add private #actions: FormaCollection<Action> field to Forma class; initialize in constructor from optional cfg.actions array; add public getter
plannedActions.test: verify constructor accepts actions array, getter returns FormaCollection

plannedActions.name: Update Forma.SCHEMA: add actions field as { name: 'actions', type: { type: 'array', items: Action.SCHEMA } }
Implement addAction(cfg: any): Action - delegate to #actions.addItem(cfg)
Implement deleteAction(id: FuzzyId): Action - delegate to #actions.deleteItem(id)
plannedActions.test: test removeAction with exact and fuzzy id

plannedActions.name: Implement getAction(id: FuzzyId): Action - delegate to #actions.getItem(id)
plannedActions.test: test getAction with exact and fuzzy id

plannedActions.name: Implement patchAction(id: FuzzyId, cfg: any): Action - delegate to #actions.patchItem(id, cfg)
Verify patch() ignores actions field (only updates name/summary)
plannedActions.test: test patch() does not modify actions

plannedActions.name: Add comprehensive tests: constructor with actions, add/remove/get/update methods, fuzzy ID matching, Avro serialize/deserialize with actions, actions immutability

references.text: FormaCollection.schemaOf(ItemClass) - generates Avro array schema for typed collections (e.g., ActionFormaCollection). Returns { name, namespace, type: 'array', items: ItemClass.SCHEMA }
Identifiable.SCHEMA - static getter returning Avro record schema with id field (UUID64.avroSchema). Namespace: scvoice.nameforma. Added for type-safe serialization of all Identifiable subclasses.
DECISION: Store actions as private #actions: FormaCollection<Action> with controlled methods (addAction, removeAction, updateAction, getAction) for Kafka-friendly granular mutations
DECISION: Use FormaCollection.matchId() pattern for fuzzy ID lookup - returns first match within Levenshtein distance threshold (see forma-collection.ts:110-113)
test/action.ts now uses FormaCollection.schemaOf(Action) instead of inline array schema definition. Pattern: const schema = FormaCollection.schemaOf(ItemClass); Schema.register(schema, ...);
DECISION: patch() ignores actions field; use dedicated methods (addAction/removeAction/updateAction) for Kafka-friendly granular updates
DECISION: Support both constructor init (new Forma({ actions: [...] })) and post-construction (forma.addAction(action))
DECISION: Method naming follows camelCase (addAction, getAction) - matches existing codebase style
UUID64 class - has avroSchema property for Avro encoding (uuid64.ts:81-88)
FormaCollection class (forma-collection.ts) - extends Array<T extends Forma>, provides matchId() for fuzzy id lookup via Levenshtein
Forma base class - extends Identifiable with name/summary, Avro schema, patch() method (forma.ts:69)
Action class - extends Forma with status field (todo|done), Avro schema with enum (action.ts:25)

summary: Add actions: Action[] field to Forma with Avro schema support, getters/setters, and comprehensive tests
